ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Unique name or code for the experiment */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell type used in the experiment */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test type used in the experiment (e.g., MTT assay) */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material used in the experiment (e.g., SiO2) */,
  "time_hr" REAL /* Time of the experiment in hours */,
  "concentration_ug_ml" REAL /* Concentration of the material in the experiment in ug/ml */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_cell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_types" (
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell type */,
  "cell_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cell type */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the cell line is derived */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue the cell line represents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Brief description of the protocol used for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the material */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viability_data" (
  "viability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viability data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that produced the viability data */,
  "viability_percent" REAL /* Viability percentage */,
  "viability_standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the viability data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viability_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hydrodynamic_diameter_data" (
  "hydrodynamic_diameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hydrodynamic diameter data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that produced the hydrodynamic diameter data */,
  "hydrodynamic_diameter_nm" REAL /* Hydrodynamic diameter in nanometers */,
  "hydrodynamic_diameter_standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the hydrodynamic diameter data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hydrodynamic_diameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hydrodynamic_diameter_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zeta_potential_data" (
  "zeta_potential_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zeta potential data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that produced the zeta potential data */,
  "zeta_potential_mv" REAL /* Zeta potential in millivolts */,
  "zeta_potential_standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the zeta potential data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zeta_potential_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zeta_potential_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions (JSON object or comma-separated list) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)
